title: The Heist of the Ruby Skull
lore_and_rules: The Tomb is cursed. Magic items glow when near danger. Kaelen is mortal and must rely on stealth and tools rather than brute strength.
starting_inventory: [Status] Health: Good. Items: Short sword, Backpack (2 rations, bottle of water), Rope (30ft), Torch (unlit). State: Mischievious.

plot_outline.title: The City Gates
plot_outline.setting: The slums outside the walls of Oakhaven. Midnight.
plot_outline.goal: Find a way to sneak past or bribe the city guards to enter Oakhaven.
plot_outline.obstacles: The guards are highly alert. Kaelen has no money for a bribe.

plot_outline.title: The Noble's Estate
plot_outline.setting: The courtyard of Lord Vane's massive estate.
plot_outline.goal: Break into the manor and locate the safe holding the Ruby Skull.
plot_outline.obstacles: Locked doors, patrolling guard dogs, trap runes on the windows.

plot_outline.title: The Escape
plot_outline.goal: Escape the city with the Ruby Skull before the guards catch you.
plot_outline.obstacles: Slippery shingles, guards shooting crossbows, a rival thief trying to steal the skull.
